objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem840_read_839_and_continue.json')
status_in=prev.get('status')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='dispatch_results_missing_after_json_fix' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Force a known-good self dispatch item and a Claude dispatch item. They are valid JSON only.
    items=[('bem841_self_dispatch_probe.json','codex-runner.yml'),('bem841_claude_dispatch_probe.json','claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')]
    for name,wf in items:
        p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')/name
        p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':wf,'workflow_id':wf,'ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 execute BEM-840 next action: prove dispatch result after JSON fix','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
        created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_probe_items_created'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results status files'
elif status_in=='dispatch_result_exists_runtime_missing' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 repair runtime state after dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='runtime_exists_real_response_missing' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_real_response_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 retry real Claude response proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real response'
else:
    status='triad_present_or_unknown'
    next_action='verify triad or process real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_next.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute BEM-840 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_next.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 selected next action by creating valid dispatch probe queue items for the missing proof')
